phases.title: Webhook Infrastructure & Orchestration

tasks.title: Implement src/server/github.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Add `/webhook/github` endpoint, verify signature, filter PR events, track phase completion, and call `harvestFeature`

tasks.description: Modify: Update `harvestFeature` with idempotency guard against duplicate runs

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 1
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `pnpm vitest run tests/server-github.test.ts --grep "Webhook ignores unmerged PRs"` exits 0

tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

phases.title: Done, Done! Notification

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/harvest.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Wire `notifyDoneDone` to format and post the summary to the `003-slack` module API

tasks.title: Implement src/server/github.ts
tasks.description: Modify: Ensure no slack notification is dispatched directly from the webhook to satisfy FR-H11

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 4
tasks.description: Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

doneWhen: `pnpm vitest run tests/harvest-e2e.test.ts --grep "Done Done notification sent exactly once"` exits 0

phases.title: Post-Ship Issue Tracking

tasks.title: Implement src/server/github.ts
tasks.description:
Modify: Add support for GitHub `issues` events opened/closed/labeled and feature association logic

REVIEW FAIL (code): Type Safety violation — ADR-003.
  WHERE: src/server/github.ts:46-47
  EXPECTED: Use proper types for GitHub webhook payload instead of 'any'.
  ACTUAL: const payload = request.body as any;
  FIX: Define a 'GitHubWebhookPayload' type (or use existing one if available) and cast to it.
  GATE: gates/T015-gate.sh assertion #1
  REF: plan.md Phase 5 > Type Dependency Graph

tasks.title: Implement src/db/issues.ts
tasks.description:
New: DB access layer for saving/updating issues
REVIEW FAIL (code): Misconfigured gate script — TR-H11.
  WHERE: specs/011-harvest/gates/T017-gate.sh:1-13
  EXPECTED: Gate should run src/db/issues.test.ts to verify DB persistence.
  ACTUAL: Gate runs tests/harvest-e2e.test.ts which is unimplemented.
  FIX: Update gate script to run pnpm vitest run src/db/issues.test.ts.
  GATE: gates/T017-gate.sh assertion #2
  REF: plan.md Phase 5 > Test Strategy

tasks.title: Implement src/engine/issues.ts
tasks.description:
New: Logic to format and trigger Slack notifications via `003-slack`

REVIEW FAIL (code): Misconfigured gate script — T018.
  WHERE: specs/011-harvest/gates/T018-gate.sh:1-15
  EXPECTED: Gate should verify src/engine/issues.ts implementation.
  ACTUAL: Gate checks src/engine/harvest.ts for Phase 2 logic (getCompressionRecord).
  FIX: Update gate script to verify association logic and slack notification formatting.
  GATE: gates/T018-gate.sh assertion #1
  REF: tasks.json Phase 5 > T018

tasks.title: Implement test strategy for Phase 5
tasks.description:
Implement all unit and integration tests defined in the phase test strategy.

REVIEW FAIL (code): Misconfigured gate script — T019.
  WHERE: specs/011-harvest/gates/T019-gate.sh:1-15
  EXPECTED: Gate should verify Phase 5 test strategy (integration/unit tests).
  ACTUAL: Gate checks src/server/github.ts for Phase 4 logic (duplicate slack notification).
  FIX: Update gate script to run the relevant tests for Phase 5.
  GATE: gates/T019-gate.sh assertion #1
  REF: tasks.json Phase 5 > T019

doneWhen: `pnpm vitest run tests/server-github.test.ts --grep "Issue to feature association"` exits 0
